selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining compact grammar and admissibility packet on the controller action board after the work-surface reduction pair cleared.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the compact Thread B bootpack into controller-facing interface, vocabulary, evidence, and authority fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next shadow-vs-live duplicate tree and curated-wrapper lineage packet once the compact Thread B grammar packet is reduced.
Strongest next archive-boundary lineage packet after the compact Thread B controller fences are isolated.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the compact Thread B bootpack's message discipline, term-admission, evidence, and authority tensions tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: ONE_CONTAINER_NO_PROSE_INTERFACE_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's strict one-container and no-prose message discipline into a controller-facing interface gate.

candidate_items.name: STAGED_TERM_ADMISSION_BEFORE_FREE_VOCABULARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's derived-only and staged term-admission pipeline as a controller vocabulary gate.

candidate_items.name: EVIDENCE_CONSUMER_NOT_SIM_EXECUTOR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's enforcement-only Thread B stance into a controller split between evidence consumption and lower-loop simulation execution.

candidate_items.name: RULE_COLLISIONS_BLOCK_DIRECT_KERNEL_PROMOTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the namespace and metric-syntax collisions into a direct nonpromotion gate for controller use.

candidate_items.name: IMPORTED_STATE_BOUNDARY_LIMITS_SELF_AUTHORITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's imported-state dependence as a controller boundary against reading self-declared authority as self-contained truth.

quarantined_items.name: SOLE_SOURCE_BOOTPACK_AS_ACTIVE_SYSTEM_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Imported-state dependence and unreconciled internal rule collisions make direct active-authority promotion unsafe.

quarantined_items.name: GLOBAL_EQUALS_BAN_AS_ALREADY_EXECUTABLE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves a literal collision between the unquoted-`=` ban and admitted `SIM_EVIDENCE` metric syntax.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier seven controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the eighth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
